title: Q15X25
short description: Q15X25, also known as NEWQPSK, is an experimental amateur radio packet modem developed by Pawel Jalocha SP9VRC. Q15X25 is a OFDM QPSK implementation of the AX.25 Packet protocol used in PACKET.
description: **Q15X25**, also known as **NEWQPSK**, is an experimental amateur radio packet modem developed by Pawel Jalocha SP9VRC. Q15X25 is an OFDM QPSK implementation of the AX.25 Packet protocol used in [PACKET](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/PACKET). Q15X25 uses ARQ and FEC and performs just like a packet radio terminal.
